words.tip: 'Ongeveer tien minuten' = about ten minutes. Very common in everyday speech.
Also used as a reaction: 'Precies!' = Exactly! / That's right!
From 'stijgen' (to rise). 'Stijgende lijn' = ascending line. Opposite: dalend.
From 'dalen' (to descend). 'Dalende trend' = falling trend. Opposite: stijgend.
Also means a school grade. 'Een goed cijfer' = a good mark.
A great example of Dutch compound stacking. Telefoon + nummer, no spaces.
Soft 'g'. 'Getal' = a number as a concept (vs. 'nummer' = a label/identifier).
Used for phone numbers, house numbers, seat numbers — things with labels.
'De helft van tien is vijf' = Half of ten is five.
Een kwart = one quarter. Also used in telling time: 'kwart over drie'.
